hero.tagline: Full-stack engineer. I build production SaaS from Figma to Kubernetes. Based in Yaoundé, shipping globally.

about.label: ABOUT
about.headline: Building products that ship end-to-end.
about.p1: Full-stack engineer with a {holistic view} of the lifecycle : from {pixel-perfect UI} in Figma to {production APIs}, from {shipping features} to managing the {infrastructure} they run on.
about.p2: I work across the {full stack} without switching context. Design decisions inform {backend architecture}. DevOps constraints shape {frontend choices}. {Everything is connected}.
about.p3: {Founder} of {Solumentics}, partnered with {international SMEs} and institutions across Europe and Africa to build {software that actually matters}.
about.quote: I don't just write code. I own the outcome.

01.desc: The digital roadmap for accessibility in Germany. Led end-to-end architecture at Nextise GmbH to deliver WCAG-compliant tools and audits. Live at barrierehilfe.de.

02.desc: Specialized IT & AI training platform. Optimized legacy systems to support hands-on workshops for 3000+ participants and 250+ organizations.

03.desc: Custom-built thrift & resale marketplace with real-time inventory and Stripe integration. Scalable architecture for high-growth commerce.

04.desc: Strategic partner for AI integration and process automation. Building scalable, GDPR-compliant AI agents and workflows for German enterprises.

05.desc: Outreach automation platform — deployed on DO Kubernetes with self-healing DB clusters.

06.desc: Sister product to LinkReach. 40% deploy-time reduction via custom GitHub Actions.

07.desc: AI-powered workflow automation in the Nextise ecosystem.

08.desc: Sales intelligence workspace. Live at targetdesk.fr.

09.desc: Digital solutions via WAP'S CORPORATION (MTN Business Partner).

10.desc: Platform for an NGO client under Solumentics.

12.desc: Partnered w/ MTN Business ecosystem. Digital transformation delivery.
